crafting_description:
Relying on decades of experience, time-tested techniques, and a well-honed strength, here at 
LB Finance, we have long empowered our stakeholders with the freedom to express their thoughts, emotions and dreams – and armed them with the power to achieve their true potential.
 Our boundless energy and dynamism is reinforced with a perfectly balanced structure and form: attributes that drive us to rise above the challenges of today, and deliver an exceptional performance every step of the way.
crafting_description_sub:
Our unwavering dedication and passion ensures we remain poised to deliver endless opportunities for positive transformation and growth for the foreseeable future. As you read this report, we invite you to explore the ever-evolving, adaptive strategies that enable us to far surpass expectations and achieve extraordinary outcomes for our stakeholders, year after year.
LB Finance PLC. We’re crafting a vibrant future of endless possibilities.

please_contact_us: Please contact us through any of the following methods on our annual report and sustainability related matters. Our team of professionals will respond to all your queries promptly and effectively.
glimpse_of_what_we_did: Glimpse of what we did in the recent past
chathurmana_competition_content: Diamond sponsor at “Chathurmana”. The Inter-University talent competition.
cse_stock_market_challenge_content: Organising 'CSE Stock Market Challenge 2023' in collaboration with Colombo Stock Exchange.
donating_computer_resources_content: Donating computer resources, school books, equipment and school bags to the selected under privileged schools.
awareness_on_education_content: Conducting social media awareness programmes covering importance of education.
donating_dry_rations_content: Donation of dry rations to students who are suffering from healthy requirements.
awareness_on_financial_management_conten: Conducting video series on social media to build awareness of the financial management.
pre_schools_development_content: Development of under privileged 196 preschools island wide.
awareness_on_business_development_conten: Sharing information on social media to raise awareness about business development.
women_empowerment_content: Empowering women as entrepreneurs through impactful community projects.
business_entrepreneurship_development_co: Developing start-up business and budding entrepreneurs in Sri Lanka and Myanmar.
donating_blood_content: Conducting blood donation campaigns to fulfill the needs of the blood bank.
donating_blood_senehasa: Conducting a blood donation campaign joining hand with 'Senehasa Padanama'!
little_hearts_project_content: Contributing to the 'Little Hearts Project' aiming the children with heart disease.
drug_rehabilitation_content: Funding for a drug rehabilitation center development project in Rumassala.
donating_wheelchairs_content: Helping hand to physically impaired people by donating wheelchairs.
health_camps_workshops_content: Conducting social media awareness programmes covering importance of education.
conducting_social_media: Conducting social media awareness programmes covering importance of education
awareness_on_first_aid_content: Providing knowledge and the importance of the first aid and explained the necessities.
providing_knowledge_and: Providing knowledge and the importance of the first aid and explained the necessities.
donating_firewall_content: Donating firewall to Lady Ridgeway hospital to secure patients medical details.
lb_career_fair_content: Organising 'LB Career Fair' series in partnership with University of Kelaniya.
awareness_on_cyber_security_content: Conducting awareness campaigns on social media to enhance the knowledge of cyber security
lb_auto_review_content: Conducting 'LB Auto Review' to build awareness on vehicle buying trends and care tips.
career_guidance_content: Providing opportunities to young graduates and undergraduates to experience the corporate world.
enhancing_digital_literacy_content: Enhancing digital literacy of the customers and encouraging digital transaction habits.
thuru_wawamu_project_content: Thuru Wawamu Project - Planted over 40,000 trees.
gewathu_wagawata_athwelak_content: Encouraging home gardening through 'Gewathu Wagawata Athwelak'
lowering_environmental_footprint_content: Introducing digital financial initiatives like LB CIM app to lower environmental footprint.
awareness_on_national_parks_content: Raising awareness about the importance of national parks with 'Young Zoologists Association'.
introduction: This privacy policy sets out how LB Finance PLC, hereinafter called as “LBF” uses and protects any information that you give LBF when you use this website.
commitment_to_privacy: LBF is committed to ensure that your privacy is protected. Should we ask you to provide certain information by which you can be identified when using this website, then you can be assured that it will only be used in accordance with this privacy statement.
policy_changes_notice: LBF may change this policy once a year and also as and when required by updating this page. You should check this page occasionally to ensure your satisfaction with any changes. Please note that this policy is effective from 01st May 2014.
collection_intro: We may collect the following information:
collection_demographic_information: Demographic information such as postcode, preferences and interests
collection_customer_surveys: Other information relevant to customer surveys and/or offers
collection_loan_account_details: To create a loan account with LBF, you must provide us with the basic details and information required as part of our Customer Identification process and you agree to our User Terms and Conditions and this Privacy Policy, which governs how we treat your information. App collects basic information required to provide customized services (for example: loan offers, content), including your name, mailing address, postal code, job title, family details, employer details, phone number, NIC No., employment information, salary slips and declarations.
collection_third_party_registration: You will register with us using your Facebook or Google identity (“Third Party Sites”). You understand that, by creating an account or by registering through Third party sites, we and others will be able to identify you by your App Proﬁle. However, we will not be liable under any circumstance for the generation of your proﬁle or the information you provide therein. LBF will also not be liable for the photographs and data that the Users might upload, the use and misuse thereof.
use_of_information_heading: What do we do with the information we gather:
use_information_intro: We require this information to understand your needs and provide you with a better service, and in particular for the following reasons:
use_improve_products_services: We may use the information to improve our products and services
use_promotional_emails: We may periodically send promotional emails about new products, special offers or other information which we think you may find interesting via the email address which you have provided
use_market_research: Occasionally, we may also use your information to contact you for market research purposes. We may contact you by email, phone, fax or mail. We may use the information to customize the website according to your interests.
security_commitment: We are committed to ensure that your information is secure. In order to prevent unauthorized access or disclosure, we have put in place suitable physical, electronic and managerial procedures to safeguard and secure the information we collect online.
cookies_intro: A cookie is a small file which asks permission to be placed on your computer’s hard drive. Once you agree, the file is added and the cookie helps to analyze web traffic or lets you know when you visit a particular site. Cookies allow web applications to respond to you as an individual. The web application can tailor its operations to your needs, likes and dislikes by gathering and remembering information about your preferences.
cookies_traffic_log: We use traffic log cookies to identify which pages are being used. This helps us to analyze data about web page traffic and improve our website in order to tailor it to customer needs. We only use this information for statistical analysis purposes and then the data is removed from the system.
cookies_overall_use: Overall, cookies help us provide you with a better website, by enabling us to monitor which pages you find useful and which you do not. A cookie in no way gives us access to your computer or any information about you, other than the data you choose to share with us.
cookies_choice: You can choose to accept or decline cookies. Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can usually modify your browser setting to decline cookies if you prefer. This may prevent you from taking full advantage of the website.
links_to_other_sites_notice: Our website may contain links to other websites of interest. However, once you have used these links to leave our site, you should note that we do not have any control over that other website. Therefore, we cannot be responsible for the protection and privacy of any information which you provide whilst visiting such sites and such sites are not governed by this privacy statement. You should exercise caution and look at the privacy statement applicable to the website in question.
app_permissions_intro: For the purpose of Credit Risk Assessment, we need the following Permissions from you.
app_permissions_phone: Phone Permission: Collect and monitor specific information about your device including your hardware model, operating system and version, unique device identifiers like IMEI and serial number, user profile information and mobile network information to uniquely identify the devices and ensure that unauthorized devices are not able to act on your behalf to prevent frauds.
app_permissions_location: Location Permission: Collect and monitor information about the location of your device to do risk assessment for credit scoring.
app_permissions_contacts: Contacts Permission: This permission is required to detect references and auto-fill data during your credit line application process for a seamless user journey. The app collects and monitors your contacts information which includes name, phone number, account type, contact last modified date, favorites and other optional data like relationship and structural address to enrich your financial profile. This also helps us to assess your risk profile and determine your credit eligibility.
app_permissions_sms: SMS Permission: We collect and monitor only your bank related financial transaction SMS, names of transacting parties, transaction description and amount to perform a credit risk assessment. This helps us make faster credit disbursals. No personal SMS data is collected, read or stored.
app_permissions_apps: Apps Permission: Collect and monitor list of installed apps in your device for credit profile enrichment Accounts Permissions Collect and monitor list of accounts in your device for credit profile enrichment.
controlling_personal_info_intro: You may choose to restrict the collection or use of your personal information in the following ways:
controlling_personal_info_form_option: Whenever you are asked to fill in a form on the website, look for the box that you can click to indicate that you do not want the information to be used by anybody for direct marketing purposes
controlling_personal_info_change_mind: If you have previously agreed to us using your personal information for direct marketing purposes, you may change your mind at any time by writing to or emailing us at webmaster@lbfinance.lk
controlling_personal_info_no_third_party: We will not sell, distribute or lease your personal information to third parties unless we have your permission or are required by law to do so. We may use your personal information to send you promotional information about third parties which we think you may find interesting if you tell us that you wish this to happen.
controlling_personal_info_access_request: You may request details of personal information which we hold about you under the Information and Communication Technology Act of 2003. A small fee will be payable. If you would like a copy of the information held on you please write to Head of IT, LB Finance PLC, Corporate Office, No 20, Dharmapala Mawatha, Colombo 03, Sri Lanka.
controlling_personal_info_correction: If you believe that any information we are holding on you is incorrect or incomplete, please write to or email us as soon as possible, at the above addresses. We will promptly correct any information found to be incorrect.
stakeholders_intro: Explore the valuable feedback provided by our stakeholders on us by watching the videos given below.
throughout_the_year: Throughout the year, LBF has remained steadfast in its commitment to sustainability by integrating environmental, social, and governance principles into our business operations. Our initiatives were driven by the overarching goal of generating long-term value for our stakeholders, minimising our environmental impact, and making a positive societal contribution.
lb_finance_continues_its_journey: LB Finance continues its journey to integrate sustainability in a structured manner within the Company in readiness for full compliance with SLFRS S1 & S2 by due dates. The model below sets out LBF’s Sustainability Value Creation Model which encapsulates our ESG Framework. The model ensures that all three ESG pillars are covered and connects sustainability strategy with capitals to drive achieving the Company’s vision, mission, goals and values.
financial_stability_is_crucial: Financial stability is crucial to ensure the Company’s long-term resilience and its ability to create sustainable value for our stakeholders.
inclusive_growth_impacts_on: Inclusive growth impacts on societal wellbeing , social justice and equity, including managing relationships with our employees, customer and community.
we_seek_to_create_a_great_workplace: We seek to create a great workplace through our governance goals and actions which comprise direct and indirect impacts on corporate governance through transparency, matrices, data security, risk management, and ownership review.
reducing_direct_and_indirect_impacts: Reducing direct and indirect impacts on emission, pollution, climate, waste and resource management are essential to our long-term success.
the_esg_governance_structure: The ESG governance structure of LBF starts with the Board which overlooks the sustainability related activities of the Company. In order to streamline this, a sub committee has been appointed by the Board which is known as Board Sustainability Committee (BSC). The BSC is comprised of four Directors. The decisions taken at BSC level is executed by the Sustainability Management Committee which is led by seven different divisional heads to ensure sustainability practises are applied throughout the Company. This management committee is supported by the Senior Manager and Manager who are responsible for sustainability related activities. The Deputy Managing Director holds membership in both committees to bridge them, monitor progress and maintain smooth functioning.
independent_practitioners_assurance_repo: Independent practitioner’s assurance report to the Board of Directors of LB Finance PLC on the sustainability reporting criteria presented in the integrated annual report
Independent practitioner’s assurance report to the Board of Directors of LB Finance PLC on the integrated annual report
heading: Hello everyone!
welcome_message: Welcome to LB Finance Annual Report Micro-site (hereafter referred to as micro-site) which is one of the recently launched AI creations of the Company.
user_guide_description: This user guide will provide you with a sufficient understanding about how to navigate each section of the micro-site, for you to obtain the best experience.
micro_site_overview: The micro-site consists of six pages in which you will find annual report and Company related information for you to make decisions. Let’s find out!
home_page_description: Once you login to the micro-site, you will land to the home page which illustrates the theme of our 12th integrated annual report, known as “Crafting Endless Possibilities”. By reading the annual report theme content, you will get to know better what we showcase through our 2023/24 annual report.
description: The Chairman’s message and the Managing Director’s message can be listened by playing the trilingual audio versions available. Moreover, you can download the PDF versions of respective messages in English, Sinhala and Tamil languages.
integrated_dashboard_description: This is probably the best local annual report dashboard which you could ever experience. Our integrated dashboard consists of a financial and non-financial dashboard to meet your information requirements in a graphical format.
financial_dashboard_description: The financial dashboard provides you with the financial information of LB Finance for 10 years from 2015 (2014/15) to 2024 (2023/24). There are 34 ratios you could graphically illustrate, and they come under 5 ratio categories namely operating results, financial position, investor information, statutory ratios and growth. What you simply should do is, select the ratio category that you want, and then select the items (ratios), period(s) and available chart type(s) from the canvas. Placing the cursor on chart legends will give you a brief explanation on the ratios illustrated.
non_financial_dashboard_description: The non-financial dashboard provides you with the non-financial information of LB Finance for 5 years from 2020 (2019/20) to 2024 (2023/24). There are 38 measures you could graphically illustrate, and they come under 8 measurement categories namely economic wellbeing, social wellbeing, environment and landscape, business sophistication, infrastructure and quality of services, employee wellbeing, reputation and customers. What you simply should do is, select the measurement category that you want, and then select the items (measurements), period(s) and available chart type(s) from the canvas.
sustainability_description: The sustainability section of the micro-site provides you with key aspects of the Company’s sustainability reporting frameworks and practices.

pages.page_1_description: It starts off with the Board Sustainability Committee Chairperson’s message. You can listen to this by playing the trilingual audio versions available. Moreover, you can download the PDF versions of this message in English, Sinhala and Tamil languages.

pages.page_2_description: Following this, you can study the sustainability value creation model, and ESG governance framework of the Company.

pages.page_3_description: The sustainability reporting frameworks LB Finance adopted in 2023/24 are also available in this section. From the drop down, you can select a sustainability reporting framework which you prefer and explore how it has been applied in the Company. We have applied 6 globally recognised sustainability reporting frameworks during the financial year.

pages.page_4_description: Finally, you can view and download independent practitioner’s assurance reports that the Company obtained in relation to Integrated Reporting, GRI and SASB frameworks.

smart_ai_chatbot_description: We have introduced a smart AI chatbot accompanied by our LB mascot that has state of the art features compared to a usual AI chatbot. Our AI chatbot can recognise human voice so that you can even speak up your information requests to the mic in addition to typing them in the provided chat area. You will get the responses in text format to which you can also listen by clicking on the “Read me” option given.
smart_ai_chatbot_description_sub: There are two areas available in the smart AI chatbot namely the chart area and info area. In the chart area, you can request annual report related charts which you prefer to be depicted so that they will be drawn for you instantly. Conversely, in the info area, you can make any other annual report related information request that do not involve charts.
speaker_description: The speaker on bottom left-hand corner of the micro-site can be used to mute and unmute the background ballerina melody.
language_preference_description: The primary contents of our micro-site have been provided in English, Sinhala and Tamil languages to reach out any local audience. Simply you should select the preferred language from the language preference available on top right-hand corner.
accessibility_tools_description: Enhance your browsing experience with our accessibility tools. Use the screen reader to hear selected content, adjust the text size with the font size options, customize spacing and alignment to suit your needs, or modify the site's colour and contrast settings for better readability. Choose from various options like grayscale, high contrast, negative contrast, and brightness adjustments to create a viewing experience that works best for you. If needed, you can easily reset everything back to the default settings.
stakeholders_description: The stakeholder section of the micro-site shares some of our stakeholders’ experiences and their perception about the Company. You can play the videos uploaded to this section under 6 stakeholder groups namely customers, employees, business partners, society, shareholders and regulators.
our_impact_description: Being a responsible corporate citizen, LB Finance has been conducting a plenty of CSR activities over the past decades. Our impact page has recognised a glimpse of what the Company did in terms of CSR in the recent history under 6 pillars namely access to education, knowledge sharing, community wellbeing, building partnerships, transformative & business linked CSR, and protecting environment.
our_impact_description_sub: By scrolling down, you can see the projects which were conducted, number of beneficiaries associated, and employee hours utilised for each of these projects under this section.
connect_description: The connect section primarily links you with LB sustainability Facebook page from which you could get sustainability and annual report related information. This part of the connect section gets updated simultaneously with the information fed to the LB sustainability Facebook page.
connect_description_sub: In addition, the connect section provides contact us details of LB Finance for you to make annual report and sustainability related inquiries.
we_have_introduced_a_smart_ai: We have introduced a smart AI chatbot accompanied by our LB mascot that has state of the art features compared to a usual AI chatbot. Our AI chatbot can recognise human voice so that you can even speak up your information requests to the mic in addition to typing them in the provided chat area. You will get the responses in text format to which you can also listen by clicking on the “Read me” option given.
we_have_introduced_a_smart_ai_sub: There are two areas available in the smart AI chatbot namely the chart area and info area. In the chart area, you can request annual report related charts which you prefer to be depicted so that they will be drawn for you instantly. Conversely, in the info area, you can make any other annual report related information request that do not involve charts.
annual_results_description: The annual results of LB Finance for 2023/24 have been presented under this section in four formats.
pdf_version_description: PDF version is a primary way of presenting the annual report. You can download this PDF version and open it using a PDF reader.
html_version_description: Hypertext markup language version is a newly introduced format of the annual report. Once you click on this, you will be redirected to the web version of our annual report that has been designed under 7 key sections. Each section starts with an attractive breaker, and you can download the content of these sections in PDF format. Notes to the financial statements have been hyperlinked to navigate faster.
flip_book_description: This is another e-version of the annual report which you can flip from one page to the next, both forward and backward. It gives you the feeling of reading a traditional book, but in digital format.
annual_report_video_description: We have presented you a summarised version of our annual report in a video format. You can play this video and get an overview of how we performed in financial year 2023/24.
welcomeMessage: Welcome to the LB Finance PLC Annual Report micro-site. By accessing or using this micro-site, you agree to the following Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use this micro-site.

terms_sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms_sections.description: By accessing this micro-site, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and such modifications will be effective immediately upon posting. It is your responsibility to review these terms periodically.

terms_sections.title: Access and Use
terms_sections.description: This micro-site is provided for informational purposes only. You may access and use the micro-site and its contents solely for your personal, non-commercial use. Unauthorized use of this micro-site, including but not limited to, unauthorized copying or redistribution of contents, is prohibited.

terms_sections.title: Intellectual Property
terms_sections.description: All contents, including but not limited to, text, graphics, logos, and reports are the property of LB Finance PLC or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or otherwise use any contents from this micro-site without prior written permission from LB Finance PLC.

terms_sections.title: Disclaimers
terms_sections.description: The information on this micro-site is provided 'as is' and without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. LB Finance PLC makes no representations or warranties about the accuracy or completeness of the contents. We disclaim all liability for any errors or omissions in the contents and for any actions taken based on the information provided.

terms_sections.title: Limitation of Liability
terms_sections.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, LB Finance PLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, or any loss of profits or data, arising out of or in connection with your use of this micro-site or its contents.

terms_sections.title: Links to Third-Party Sites
terms_sections.description: This micro-site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for your convenience and do not imply endorsement or responsibility for the contents of such third-party sites. LB Finance PLC is not responsible for the contents or practices of any linked sites.

terms_sections.title: User Conduct
terms_sections.description: You agree to use this micro-site in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. You shall not engage in any activity that disrupts or interferes with the functioning of the micro-site or its servers.

terms_sections.title: Privacy
terms_sections.description: Your use of this micro-site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms of Use by reference. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

terms_sections.title: Governing Law
terms_sections.description: These Terms of Use are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Sri Lanka. Any disputes arising out of or related to these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Sri Lanka.

please_note_that_under_both_above: Please note that under both above dashboards, you can illustrate a maximum of 6 canvases at a time.
annual_report_intro: Welcome to our annual report, where innovation meets insight. Dive into a dynamic digital journey through our achievements and milestones. Explore interactive data visualizations and engaging narratives that highlight our year's story in stunning HTML elegance. Discover how we've transformed vision into reality, and get inspired for the future ahead!
